name: qa-suite
description: Multi-agent QA orchestration framework for smoke, regression, UI/UX, performance, security hygiene, API contract, and compatibility testing.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined multi-agent QA orchestration for real software projects.
interface.longDescription: Orchestrate independent QA agents for smoke, regression, UI/UX, performance, security hygiene, API contract, and compatibility testing with evidence-anchored reports and platform checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use qa-suite to set up QA for this project.
Use qa-suite to run smoke QA.
Use qa-suite for a full release audit.
